steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine may contain suspended particles, sediment, yeasts, or bacteria before bottling.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Filtration passes wine through a medium that retains particles and, at sufficiently fine grades, microorganisms.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The bottled wine is clearer and can have improved physical and microbiological stability.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The bottled wine is clearer and can have improved physical and microbiological stability.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
